  • Method Details

    • addPoint

      public BlowdownPressureProfile.Builder addPoint(double time, String timeUnit, double pressure, String pressureUnit)
      Adds one pressure profile point.
      Parameters:
      time - value of time
      timeUnit - time unit, s or min
      pressure - value of pressure
      pressureUnit - pressure unit, bara, bar, or barg
      Returns:
      this builder

    • interpolationMode

      public BlowdownPressureProfile.Builder interpolationMode(BlowdownPressureProfile.InterpolationMode interpolationMode)
      Sets pressure interpolation mode.
      Parameters:
      interpolationMode - interpolation mode; must not be null
      Returns:
      this builder

    • gaugeOffsetBara

      public BlowdownPressureProfile.Builder gaugeOffsetBara(double gaugeOffsetBara)
      Sets absolute-to-gauge pressure offset.
      Parameters:
      gaugeOffsetBara - gauge offset in bara; must be non-negative
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public BlowdownPressureProfile build()
      Builds the pressure profile.
      Returns:
      pressure profile

    • convertTimeToSeconds

      private static double convertTimeToSeconds(double time, String unit)
      Converts time to seconds.
      Parameters:
      time - time value
      unit - time unit text
      Returns:
      time in seconds

    • convertPressureToBara

      private double convertPressureToBara(double pressure, String unit)
      Converts pressure to bara.
      Parameters:
      pressure - pressure value
      unit - pressure unit text
      Returns:
      pressure in bara
